_note: Spring shedding survival guide reel — data-driven engineer narrative on Nalla's seasonal shedding, with the 'weighed fur on a kitchen scale' hook (18g vs 11g per session). Mirrors the dogfoodandfun.com/spring-shedding-survival-guide-2026 post.
ig_caption:
Spring shedding turned our apartment into a fur factory. So I did what every engineer does — I weighed the fur.

• Maxpower Planet ($12) → 11g per session
• FURminator ($29) → 18g per session
• Salmon oil → ~20-25% less shedding in 3 weeks

For $41 total and 40 minutes a week, ambient fur dropped about 70%.

The goal isn't to stop shedding (you can't) — it's to remove the loose undercoat before it ends up in your coffee.

Full write-up with grams-per-session data: link in bio

What's working for your dog this spring?

#dogshedding #doublecoat #dogcare #springshedding #nallasdad #dogfoodandfun
title: I Weighed Nalla's Shedding Fur on a Kitchen Scale
